function_v0.doc: Records a failed `lz_receive` execution for off-chain processing.
function_v0.name: lz_receive_alert

function_v0.doc: Records a failed `lz_compose` execution for off-chain processing.
function_v0.name: lz_compose_alert

cases.doc: Library is already registered with the endpoint
cases.name: AlreadyRegistered

cases.doc: Compose message already exists for this GUID and index
cases.name: ComposeExists

cases.doc: Compose message not found for the given GUID and index
cases.name: ComposeNotFound

cases.doc: Default receive library is not set for the source endpoint
cases.name: DefaultReceiveLibUnavailable

cases.doc: Default send library is not set for the destination endpoint
cases.name: DefaultSendLibUnavailable

cases.doc: Supplied native token fee is less than required
cases.name: InsufficientNativeFee

cases.doc: Supplied ZRO token fee is less than required
cases.name: InsufficientZroFee

cases.doc: Timeout expiry is invalid (already expired)
cases.name: InvalidExpiry

cases.doc: Amount is invalid (negative)
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: Compose index exceeds maximum allowed value
cases.name: InvalidIndex

cases.doc: Nonce is invalid for the requested operation
cases.name: InvalidNonce

cases.doc: Payload hash is invalid (empty hash not allowed)
cases.name: InvalidPayloadHash

cases.doc: Receive library is not valid for the receiver and source endpoint
cases.name: InvalidReceiveLibrary

cases.doc: Operation requires a non-default (custom) library
cases.name: OnlyNonDefaultLib

cases.doc: Library must support receiving messages
cases.name: OnlyReceiveLib

cases.doc: Library must be registered with the endpoint
cases.name: OnlyRegisteredLib

cases.doc: Library must support sending messages
cases.name: OnlySendLib

cases.doc: Messaging path cannot be initialized for the given origin
cases.name: PathNotInitializable

cases.doc: Message cannot be verified for the given origin
cases.name: PathNotVerifiable

cases.doc: Payload hash does not match the stored hash
cases.name: PayloadHashNotFound

cases.doc: New value is the same as existing value
cases.name: SameValue

cases.doc: Caller is not authorized (not OApp or delegate)
cases.name: Unauthorized

cases.doc: Endpoint ID is not supported by the library
cases.name: UnsupportedEid

cases.doc: ZRO fee must be greater than zero when pay_in_zro is true
cases.name: ZeroZroFee

cases.doc: ZRO token address is not set
cases.name: ZroUnavailable

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameters for sending a cross-chain message.
udt_struct_v0.name: MessagingParams

fields.doc: Destination endpoint ID (chain identifier).
fields.name: dst_eid

fields.doc: The message payload to send.
fields.name: message

fields.doc: Encoded executor and DVN options.
fields.name: options

fields.doc: Whether to pay fees in ZRO token instead of native token.
fields.name: pay_in_zro

fields.doc: Receiver address on the destination chain (32 bytes).
fields.name: receiver

udt_struct_v0.doc: Source message information identifying where a cross-chain message came from.
udt_struct_v0.name: Origin

fields.doc: Nonce for this pathway.
fields.name: nonce

fields.doc: Sender address on the source chain (32 bytes).
fields.name: sender

fields.doc: Source endpoint ID (chain identifier).
fields.name: src_eid

fields.doc: Fee paid in native token (XLM).
fields.name: native_fee

fields.doc: Fee paid in ZRO token (LayerZero token).
fields.name: zro_fee

udt_struct_v0.doc: Receipt returned after successfully sending a cross-chain message.
udt_struct_v0.name: MessagingReceipt

fields.doc: The fees charged for sending the message.
fields.name: fee

fields.doc: Globally unique identifier for the message.
fields.name: guid

fields.doc: The outbound nonce for this pathway.
fields.name: nonce

udt_union_v0.doc: Type of message library indicating supported operations.
udt_union_v0.name: MessageLibType

void_v0.doc: Supports both sending and receiving messages.
void_v0.name: SendAndReceive

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Version information for a message library.

Note: `minor` and `endpoint_version` use `u32` instead of `u8` because Stellar does not
support `u8` types in contract interface functions.
udt_struct_v0.name: MessageLibVersion

fields.doc: Endpoint version (should not exceed u8::MAX = 255).
fields.name: endpoint_version

fields.doc: Major version number.
fields.name: major

fields.doc: Minor version number (should not exceed u8::MAX = 255).
fields.name: minor

udt_struct_v0.doc: Timeout configuration for receive library transitions.
udt_struct_v0.name: Timeout

fields.doc: Unix timestamp in seconds when the timeout expires.
fields.name: expiry

fields.doc: The old library address that remains valid during the grace period.
fields.name: lib

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameters for setting message library configuration.
udt_struct_v0.name: SetConfigParam

fields.doc: XDR-encoded configuration data.
fields.name: config

fields.doc: The type of configuration (e.g., executor, ULN).
fields.name: config_type

fields.doc: The endpoint ID this config applies to.
fields.name: eid

udt_struct_v0.doc: Resolved library information with default status.
udt_struct_v0.name: ResolvedLibrary

fields.doc: Whether this is the default library (true) or OApp-specific (false).
fields.name: is_default

fields.doc: The resolved library address.
fields.name: lib

udt_struct_v0.doc: Outbound packet containing all information for cross-chain transmission.
udt_struct_v0.name: OutboundPacket

fields.doc: Destination endpoint ID.
fields.name: dst_eid

fields.doc: Globally unique identifier for this message.
fields.name: guid

fields.doc: The message payload.
fields.name: message

fields.doc: Outbound nonce for this pathway.
fields.name: nonce

fields.doc: Receiver address on destination chain (32 bytes).
fields.name: receiver

fields.doc: Sender address on source chain.
fields.name: sender

fields.doc: Source endpoint ID.
fields.name: src_eid

udt_struct_v0.doc: A fee recipient with the amount to be paid.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeRecipient

fields.doc: Amount of fee to pay.
fields.name: amount

fields.doc: The address to send the fee to.
fields.name: to

udt_struct_v0.doc: Result of send operation containing fees and encoded packet.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeesAndPacket

fields.doc: The encoded packet ready for transmission.
fields.name: encoded_packet

fields.doc: List of native token fee recipients (executor, DVNs, treasury).
fields.name: native_fee_recipients

fields.doc: List of ZRO token fee recipients (treasury).
fields.name: zro_fee_recipients

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Destination chain configuration for executor fee calculation.

Contains gas costs and fee parameters specific to each destination chain.
These parameters are used by the fee library to calculate accurate execution fees.
udt_struct_v0.name: DstConfig

fields.doc: Minimum fee margin in USD (scaled) to ensure profitability.
fields.name: floor_margin_usd

fields.doc: Base gas cost per lzCompose call on the destination chain.
fields.name: lz_compose_base_gas

fields.doc: Base gas cost for lzReceive execution on the destination chain.
fields.name: lz_receive_base_gas

fields.doc: Fee multiplier in basis points for this destination (0 = use default multiplier).
fields.name: multiplier_bps

fields.doc: Maximum native token value that can be transferred to the destination.
fields.name: native_cap

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameters for setting destination configuration.\n\nUsed when configuring executor settings for a specific destination chain.
udt_struct_v0.name: SetDstConfigParam

fields.doc: Configuration for the destination chain.
fields.name: dst_config

fields.doc: Destination endpoint ID (chain identifier).
fields.name: dst_eid

udt_struct_v0.doc: Parameters for a native token drop.\n\nUsed to specify native token transfers as part of executor options.
udt_struct_v0.name: NativeDropParams

fields.doc: Amount of native tokens to transfer.
fields.name: amount

fields.doc: Receiver address for the native token transfer.
fields.name: receiver

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a signer is added or removed.
event_v0.name: SignerSet

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when the signature threshold is changed.
event_v0.name: ThresholdSet

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when ownership is transferred (both single-step and two-step completion).
event_v0.name: OwnershipTransferred

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a 2-step ownership transfer is proposed.
event_v0.name: OwnershipTransferring

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a 2-step ownership transfer is cancelled.
event_v0.name: OwnershipTransferCancelled

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when ownership is renounced.
event_v0.name: OwnershipRenounced

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a role is granted.
event_v0.name: RoleGranted

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a role is revoked.
event_v0.name: RoleRevoked

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a role admin is changed.
event_v0.name: RoleAdminChanged

udt_struct_v0.doc: TTL configuration: threshold (when to extend) and extend_to (target TTL).
udt_struct_v0.name: TtlConfig

fields.doc: Target TTL after extension (in ledgers).
fields.name: extend_to

fields.doc: TTL threshold that triggers extension (in ledgers).
fields.name: threshold

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when TTL configs are set.
event_v0.name: TtlConfigsSet

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when TTL configs are frozen.
event_v0.name: TtlConfigsFrozen
